response: THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME IS EXPRESSED AS W_F = W * (0.98)^N. TO ACHIEVE A 25% REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE, WE SOLVE 0.25 = 1 - (0.98)^N, WHICH REQUIRES N TO BE AT LEAST 129. CHECK YOUR CLOCK TO SEE HOW MUCH TIME REMAINS BEFORE THE EVENT STARTS. LOOK AT THE CLOCK AGAIN TO REMEMBER THAT PREPARATION IS KEY. SET YOUR CLOCK TO REMIND YOU TO DOUBLE-CHECK YOUR GEAR SELECTION.
